title: William Chen - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
William Chen - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet William Chen
Khoury Alumni
MS in Computer Science ’21
Silicon Valley Campus
When William Chen came to the Align program, he felt a sense of purpose and dedication rippling across the student body. Now a full-time software developer at Amazon Web Services, he credits his time in the program for teaching him how to work in a large team environment.
The co-op was an excellent way for me to get exposure to what it feels like to work on a large team … And understanding what work culture is through that co-op, I was able to get a return offer for a full-time position
William Chen, Align MSCS ’21
Explore all Khoury Stories
